headlines.title: Airlines restore some Middle East flights as suspensions continue
headlines.snippet: Airlines restore some Middle East flights as suspensions continue Some airlines are restoring flights to parts of the Middle East as diplomatic efforts to end the war on Iran gather pace, though many carriers have kept suspensions in place.

headlines.title: Hormuz shipping may take months to return to normal, French shipping company says
headlines.snippet: The chairman and CEO of French shipping company CMA CGM anticipates that the shipping situation in the Strait of Hormuz will improve in the coming days, but a return to normal is expected to take several months. The company has had vessels stuck in the Gulf since the US-Israeli war on Iran began in late February. Approximately 20 percent of the world's oil normally passes through this vital waterway.

headlines.title: Oil prices fall as US leaders strike positive note on Iran talks
headlines.snippet: Oil prices decreased by over 1 percent following positive remarks from US leaders regarding talks between Washington and Tehran. Brent futures fell to $71.57 a barrel, and US West Texas Intermediate crude dropped to $68.58 a barrel, both reaching their lowest levels since March. Trump and Vance had previously described the talks as progressing "very well" and "extremely well."

headlines.title: Iranian parliament speaker says IAEA barred from bombed nuclear sites
headlines.snippet: Iran's parliament speaker stated that inspections of nuclear sites that have been bombed and damaged are prohibited. He noted that the International Atomic Energy Agency has only been granted access to two sites in Iran, including the Bushehr power plant.

headlines.title: Centcom leads regional security dialogue with Middle East military officials
headlines.snippet: US Central Command, alongside Bahrain's defence forces, led a security dialogue with military officials from across the Middle East. Representatives discussed enhancing regional defense collaboration, with Admiral Brad Cooper emphasizing a shared commitment to regional security and stability.
